reviews_list.batch_info: BAMS - Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Our college is good in terms of teaching but the management is not good.

review_content.Placements: Almost everyone from the college gets placed from the course. The highest salary offered is 2 Lacs, the lowest is 30,000 average is about 70,000. There are many hospitals which recruit ayurvedic practitioner either it's for modern medicine or ayurvedic medicine. Everyone in the college gets internship.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college is well built, there is no availability of wi-fi. There are well-equipped laboratories and libraries, the classrooms have CCTV cameras which work 24 hours. But there are no signs of renovation. The hostel provides good food, there are no games and sports, good medical facilities.

reviews_list.batch_info: BAMS - Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Good at theory but fails in practical .

review_content.Placements: Our college provides good placements in many of the government ayurvedic hospital but the practice is very important. So internship place major role in getting more and more practiced. Most probably 60-70 % of the students get passed out to the higher studies if interested or can get practice in many ayurvedic hospital .
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college doesn't provide any hostel we have to opt for PG in Davanagere it is very difficult for us. Our labs don't provide many of the instruments. Rasa shastra labs go on well with the requirements needed. Classrooms are good buti library is not upto the mark.

overview_faqs.question: Is Kanpur Institute of Technology and Pharmacy a known college/Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: Kanpur Institute of Technology and Pharmacy is a renowned institution offering M.Pharma, D.Pharma, B.Voc, B.Pharma. Students can choose these courses to embark on their careers in the field of Medicine & Health Sciences. The institute is staffed with highly skilled and experienced faculty members dedicated to delivering these programs. Kanpur Institute of Technology and Pharmacy boasts an impressive review rating of 1.8 based on student feedback at Shiksha. Additionally, it has received a rating of 2 for Campus Life, 2 for Placements, 2 for Faculty, and 2 for Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: Kanpur Institute of Technology and Pharmacy Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.title: It satisfies us a lot.

content.Placements: 60% of students get placements. The colleges provide good and better placements. The highest package is 7 LPA and the lowest package is 4 LPA. Mankind and other companies hire students from the college. It depends on students, what skills they have, how they talk in the interview, and what skills they show.
content.Infrastructure: The college is very good in terms of facilities. There is 24-hour water, 24-hour light, AC in every classroom which keeps running, Wi-Fi, computer lab, library, and a lot more which is provided to students. The college provides a lot, and the college is very good.

individual_reviews.title: Campus, infrastructure, placements, internship opportunities are provided by KIT.

content.Placements: Placement is good; they provide opportunities to work in the top 10 pharma industries. I also got an offer to work at MACLEOD PHARMA; they provide 215000 rupees per annum. The college also provides jobs in Sun Pharma, Mankind, Cipla, Skiny Pharmaceuticals, Zydus Life sciences and Pfizer .
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are in excellent condition, with full AC rooms. They also provide projector facilities in each and every classroom. In this way, faculty try their best to teach their students. This helps the students so much to learn every topic, which is so complicated. The labs are in excellent condition, and you are free to go to your senior lab to perform your practical if equipment is available in your lab. Facilities are experienced and can help you solve your doubts.

individual_reviews.title: Review of Kanpur Institute of Technology and Pharmacy.

content.Placements: Students get placed based on their talent. Companies come here, but only worthy students are placed, not all. Don't depend on the college, rather depend on yourself for placements.
content.Infrastructure: The food provided is tasteless. No Wi-Fi is available. The labs are dirty. Distilled water is not available. They say that they provided AC facilities, but they don't. They charge high fees, but they do not provide facilities. I am a second-year student.
content.Faculty: Some of the faculty members are good, not all. They don't know how to manage the students. They don't have much experience. They are bad at explaining and do not know how to teach the students.

highlights.summary:
The NEET UG 2026 registration window is now closed for admission to the MBBS, BDS, and other courses. The exam is scheduled for May 3, 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely satisfied with my admission in this college.

review_content.Placements: It's an medical profession, so no company comes for placementS. The total strength of the students per batch is 150, and there are total 2 batches for now. Internships are mandatory for all the students, and it's a paid internship. The highest salary package offered to interns ranges between Rs. 30,000 to Rs. 40,000, and the lowest is Rs. 5,000.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of the college is top of the table. No college in the whole state has such modern infrastructure in the medical profession. The college provides us with Wi-Fi facilities, and all the classrooms have centralized AC. There are more than 10 teaching rooms in the entire college for different small group discussions and other activities. Lecture theatre has a capacity for 200 students. Labs are occupied with high-tech equipment, and the library is pretty big and luxurious.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: The studies are average, but the infrastructure is very good.

review_content.Placements: We are the first batch, and currently we are in our second year. None of the students has passed the internship. This implies that internship status is N/A However, we know that the nursing people, many of them, joined the hospital after completing their respective courses. So even though we have an option B, we primarily try to crack NEET PG.
review_content.Infrastructure: College campus, though small, is a beautiful place. The infrastructure and facilities are better than those of average colleges in Gujarat. Wi-Fi, classrooms, and the library are all well developed and quite good. The quality of mess food and the standard of hostel rooms are also very good. Overall, the living experience is quite well.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2024

review_content.Placements: I am from MBBS Batch of 2024-2029. Since it's a medical course, there are no placements in the conventional sense, like engineering or management. However, students go on to pursue internships (Compulsory Rotatory Residential Internship CRRI) at college hospital. Internship is part of curriculum, and 100% of students are placed in hospital departments as per NMC regulations.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college has well-equipped dissection halls, histology labs, skill labs, lecture halls with audio-visual aids, a central library with digital access, and 24/7 Wi-Fi. Hostels are clean and secure with good maintenance, though food quality in mess is average. There is a medical center, ambulance services, and facilities for indoor/outdoor sports. Overall, infrastructure is student-friendly and improving each year.

paragraphs:
Mahender Singh College of Pharmacy course admissions are done based on entrance and merit depending on the course. The university accepts applications in offline mode only. Interested students can get theMahender Singh College of Pharmacyapplication form from the university campus. The form has to be submitted along with specified documents.
Students can pursue UG programmes in fields of Medicine and Health Sciences, and more. To know about the eligibility of Mahender Singh College of Pharmacy courses, students can visit the website.

faqs.question: How can I get into Mahender Singh College of Pharmacy for UG/PG courses? Am I eligible for admission?
faqs.answer:
Mahender Singh College of Pharmacy has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:CoursesEligibilityB.PharmaCandidate must have minimum age 17 years or more on 31-12-2023.
Candidates who have qualified any other qualification approved by the Pharmacy Council of India equivalent to any of the above examinations are also eligible to apply.D.PharmaCandidate must have passed 10+2 examination or equivalent with pass in Chemistry, Physics and Biology/Mathematics from a recognised board Or
Candidate who has passed Intermediate examination in Science Or
Candidate who are in First year of the three years degree courses in Science Or
Candidate who has passed 12 years Higher Secondary Education Board Exam (Science academic stream with Physics, Chemistry, Biology) of Higher Secondary Education Board, Nepal Or
Pre-degree examination or Any other qualification approved by Pharmacy Council of India as equivalent to any of the above examination can also apply for the course.
